_provenance: schema-derived from mission brief (2026-06-02); field names and table layout derived from database.py symphony_strategies CREATE TABLE (line 107-113) and project architecture constraints (arch-rule-4: is_live explicit, never default). No producer-computed numeric values — shapes and types only.
_mission: Per-symphony live_mode feature — MASTER-SWITCH model (LIVE_EXECUTION AND symphony_live_mode). Migration 030 adds live_mode column to symphony_strategies and creates config_audit_log table.

migration_030.description: Additive: live_mode INTEGER DEFAULT 0 on symphony_strategies + new config_audit_log table

live_mode_column.name: live_mode
live_mode_column.rationale: additive-first — NULLable with default 0 so existing rows default-dry; arch rule 4: explicit, never omitted

config_audit_log_table.name: config_audit_log
config_audit_log_table.rationale: operator-only audit trail for live_mode changes; no update/delete accessor

master_switch_truth_table.description: LIVE: both global and per-symphony are on — real trade must fire
DRY RUN: global is off even if per-symphony is on — master switch prevents real trade
DRY RUN: per-symphony is off even if global is on — default-dry safety holds
DRY RUN: both global and per-symphony are off

default_dry_run_cases.description: symphony with no symphony_strategies row — live_mode defaults to 0 (dry run)
symphony_strategies row exists with live_mode=0 — dry run

audit_log_cases.description: operator enables live_mode — audit row records before=0, after=1
operator disables live_mode — audit row records before=1, after=0

autotuner_lock_cases.description: live_mode must NOT appear inside the parameters TEXT column (the JSON blob read by autotuner); it is a separate column only
